title: Monday.com sales CRM setup

posts.author: Alessiomoc (Alessio Mocciaro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

We are a startup and have opted to use Monday.com sales CRM for our sales pipeline and dashboards.

We have found it quite complex to set up the way we would like with boards for Leads, opportunities, revenue+productivity dashboards.

Are there any experts available to set this up for us and if so, please provide your pricing so we can reach out to get this sorted.

posts.author: Carson (Carson Butcher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Alessiomoc, and welcome!

If you’re looking to do a guided setup/onboarding of monday CRM, we offer it in a clear-cut package. You can check it out here → CRM Onboarding

If you’re looking for a hands-off custom build, we’re more than happy to help with that too. We’ve onboarded more than 1,000 teams to monday.com, and I’d encourage you to book an exploration with our team to see how we could help your team.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Alessiomoc,

Our founder comes from a sales background and has a handful of ways to track those all important metrics.

Interested to learn about your team and what you’re getting after - drop us an email if you would like to connect.

teameasy@easy-mondays.com

Best,

Peta

posts.author: deepvyas (Deep Vyas)
posts.cookedHtml:

I am interested to discuss, where you found complex to setup.
Please let me know your availability for same

Contact here

posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Alessiomoc (Alessio Mocciaro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Carson,

Thanks for your response.

The link you shared to the packages doesn’t appear to work. Do you have an up to date link?

posts.cookedHtml:
